overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval stone fortification at dusk, transitioning from a torchlit interior corridor past a cooking fire, ascending stairs to an open upper walkway with views of the castle and orange sunset sky.

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking alongside Geralt through the corridor

metal cooking pot suspended by chains from wooden beams
rough-hewn medieval stone wall with warm torchlight illumination
rough-hewn medieval stone wall forming the corridor boundary
dark wooden beam ceiling covering the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cooking fire in a covered stone corridor of a medieval castle. Geralt walks forward through the torchlit passage with stone walls on both sides and wooden beams overhead, accompanied by an armored guard walking on his right.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper castle rampart with sunset view

events.description: exiting covered corridor and ascending stone stairs to open upper walkway
warm orange sunset sky becomes visible as camera reaches upper level

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing stone stairs and walking along the upper rampart with views of the sunset

notable_agents.action: armored guard removing his helmet while walking on the upper level

entered.detail: steep stone staircase ascending to the upper level
wooden roof structure providing partial cover over the walkway
low stone wall railing along the open side of the walkway
lit torch mounted on the stone wall providing warm light
silhouetted medieval tower against the orange sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions as Geralt ascends stone stairs from the covered corridor to an open upper rampart. The lighting shifts from torchlight to a dramatic orange sunset sky visible beyond the stone railing. The armored guard walks alongside and removes his helmet as they proceed along the wooden-roofed walkway with views of distant castle towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torchlit castle interior that gradually opens onto a rampart bathed in the glow of a sunset. It begins in a covered stone corridor where Geralt walks past a cooking fire, flanked by stone walls and wooden beams with an armored guard by his side. As the camera follows them forward, the scene transitions from the dim interior to a set of stone stairs that lead upward. The lighting shifts from the flicker of torches to a dramatic orange sky as they emerge onto an open upper walkway. The shot finally proceeds along the wooden-roofed rampart, passing distant castle towers while the guard removes his helmet under the fading light.
